name: myadmin-admin-mcp
description: MCP proxy for the MyAdmin admin API. Tools are generated dynamically from a remote OpenAPI spec.
long_description:
Standalone MCP (Model Context Protocol) proxy server for the MyAdmin admin API.

The server fetches its tool definitions from a remote OpenAPI spec at startup, caches them on disk with `Last-Modified` invalidation (with stale-cache fallback), and proxies each tool call to the upstream admin API. Authentication credentials (Bearer Token, X-API-KEY, or sessionid) are forwarded from the request context — or, in STDIO mode, supplied via the user configuration below.

**Runtime requirement:** this bundle runs the existing PHP launcher, so PHP 8.2 or higher must be installed and available on the host's `PATH` as `php`. The bundle ships its own `vendor/` (Composer dependencies) so `composer install` is not required on end-user machines.

**Transport:** STDIO only. The bundled HTTP mode is not exposed through MCPB.

tools.name: openapi_proxy
tools.description: Tools are generated at runtime from the remote OpenAPI spec — one MCP tool per HTTP operation. See OPENAPI_SPEC_URL for the source of truth.

openapi_spec_url.title: OpenAPI Spec URL
openapi_spec_url.description: URL to fetch the OpenAPI spec from (JSON or YAML, auto-detected). Defaults to the MyAdmin production spec.

api_base_url.title: API Base URL
api_base_url.description: Base URL of the upstream admin API that tool calls are proxied to.

bearer_token.title: Bearer Token
bearer_token.description: OAuth bearer token. Provide one of: Bearer Token, API Key, or Session ID. The first non-empty credential wins.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: X-API-KEY value. Provide one of: Bearer Token, API Key, or Session ID.

session_id.title: Session ID
session_id.description: sessionid value. Provide one of: Bearer Token, API Key, or Session ID.

ca_cert_file.title: CA Bundle (PEM)
ca_cert_file.description: Optional path to a CA bundle for self-signed or private TLS. Leave empty to use the system trust store.

ssl_verify.title: Verify TLS
ssl_verify.description: Verify TLS peer and host on outbound API calls. Disable only for local development against self-signed certs.
